Log In

Get Straight and healthy teeth from your dentist.

We work with your dentist to ensure you’re getting high quality care.

Apply Now

did you know?

EXPENSIVE dental work can USUALLY be prevented with straight teeth and an even bite.

90% of people have misaligned teeth, which can lead to deep cleanings, gum grafts, fillings, and crowns.

70% of people have misaligned bites which can lead to chipped, worn, and broken teeth.

Most PATIENTS don’t know THIS.

Most PATIENTS
don’t know THIS.

Fact #01

Clear aligners can help solve this, like Invisalign. Except, Invisalign is usually applied incorrectly.

Two front

Traditional INVISALIGN

Most general dentists primarily focus on cosmetic improvements with Invisalign. While this can enhance your smile, it often overlooks comprehensive bite alignment. General dentists also typically don't have the specialized training to design Invisalign plans that address complex orthodontic needs.

Two Front + INVISALIGN

As a Two Front member, a dentist and their patients gain access to a community of the most experienced orthodontists in the country. This partnership ensures that the Invisalign treatment isn’t just cosmetic—it’s tailored for complete bite alignment, providing a level of care and expertise that was previously inaccessible to most patients.

Connecting patients to top orthodontists .

(01)

Get a complimentary, at-home bite exam.

(02)

Pick up all aligners from your dentist.

(03)

Check in with your dedicated orthodontic concierge from home.

THE TWO FRONT

HEALTH

HEALTH

By working with a top 1% orthodontist in the country, you’re also guaranteed to have the healthiest bite, which can help you prevent thousands of dollars of dental work over your lifetime.

RESULTS

RESULTS

By working with a top 1% orthodontist, you’re smile is designed by someone who knows how to get results quickly. If you don’t go to a specialist, your dentist could be ordering endless rounds of trays with no results.

BEAUTY

BEAUTY

By working with a top 1% orthodontist in the country, you’re guaranteed to be working with a specialist in smile design using clear aligner therapy for your most beautiful smile.

LIFESTYLE

LIFESTYLE

You’ll save an average of 15 unnecessary visits to your dentist for check-ups. All check-ups happen virtually from the comfort of your home to make sure you’re on track.

PAYMENT

PAYMENT

You have the option to start treatment with no down payment and 100%approval on payment plans.

HEALTH

HEALTH

By working with a top 1%orthodontist in the country, you’re also guaranteed to have the healthiest bite, which can help you prevent thousands of dollars of dental work over your lifetime.

GUARANTEE
